title: Inbox with card view

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I would love to drop a feature suggestion for the inbox.

I am working quite a lot from the inbox. It works amazing when it comes down to giving me a quick overview of all the updates that are made within our projects / boards and cleaning my inbox on the go with the blue checkbox on the right of every item. My suggestion would be a timesaver on top of the quick overview of all the updates.

As a user I would like to be able to change column setting via the card view of an item, so I can quickly update status columns, move item to other groups and export, all that without leaving the inbox.

Monday_Inbox3216×1890 580 KB

Let me know what you think of this suggestion.

Thanks and appreciated!

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Eltjo:

I would like to be able to change column setting via the card view of an item

Sounds useful.

Thoughtful details like this are what make good software great.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 on this one.
i will add the same function by clicking in the pulse name in the board (like mobile app)
when you have so much columns is much easier to see it like that.

posts.author: antonyjose (Antony jose)
posts.cookedHtml: sounds good , i like to have it too

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday.com @brett-monday.com @Julia-monday.com

there is any news on this? could this be implemented? its on the road map?

My previous post here :

Instant Card View clicking on pulse name Feature requests
Ii think the card view should open when you click in the PULSE NAME, actually when you click in the pulse name it opens the updates section (that should open only when you click in the update icon right next to the pulse`s name. In the android app this card view opens like i was saying, i think desktop app should do the same. benefits: to easily edit or see pulses with many columns.

posts.author: lrobert (Ludovic ROBERT)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m looking for something like this too.
When I clean up my inbox, I have to open each update to get the status of the item and post a new update.

Any news from monday team ?

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @monday-team, like @lrobert points out as well the workflow in both the My week and the Inbox gets interrupted by clicking on the items and going outside of the environment. It would be great to go through the items in the Inbox and change statuses, give updates and assign without leaving the Inbox. After that check your own items in the My week being able to adjust the items there as wel without leaving.

The new Pulse Chat, or ‘modal window’ would be perfect in both the Inbox and My week environment for easy going through and review a daily dose of items.

Is there a chance of something like this being implemented? This would be a time saving add on. Thanks!

My week1482×1411 123 KB
inbox1671×1333 165 KB

posts.author: DebStat21 (Deborah)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love this feature. I love the inbox an it works great for my team, but sometimes status’ don’t get updated because you have to leave to change it.
